name: Fruit Cocktail Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the eggs to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
3. Mix in the fruit cocktail until evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
